name: A Production-Oriented Framework for Evaluation of SFX Generation

description: arXiv:2607.09973v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Industrial sound design requires audio generation systems that not only produce realistic audio, but also preserve the perceptual identity of a reference, support controllable variation, and remain efficient for practical workflows. Existing evaluations are usually tied to text-to-audio (TTA), unconditional, or task-specific settings, limiting a...
author: M\'elodie Desbos, Yara Bahram, Eric Granger, Mohammadhadi Shateri
